title: clematis alpina var. iliensis
intro: Clematis alpina var. iliensis, also known as the Ili clematis, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Clematis genus and is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as digestive problems and respiratory infections. The Ili clematis has been found to have health benefits including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions like acne and eczema. In herbal preparations, Clematis alpina var. iliensis is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as an ingredient in formulas aimed at promoting overall well-being.
